description: Metadata for curated and algorithm-generated district plans. Each entry includes metric scores for gallery display and comparison.

baseline.title: Current Enacted Map (2022)
baseline.note: Baseline for comparison. Metrics to be computed after data pipeline is complete.

note: Community-created plans will be added here as they are sourced from Dave's Redistricting App and other tools. Each plan will include a GeoJSON file path and pre-computed metric scores.
